title: .agda-mcp.json
description: Project-level configuration for agda-mcp-server. Place at the project root (PROJECT_ROOT or AGDA_MCP_ROOT). Read on every agda_load / agda_typecheck call (mtime-cached).

$schema.description: Optional JSON-Schema reference for editor support.

commandLineOptions.description: Command-line flags forwarded to Agda's Cmd_load. Validated and merged with AGDA_MCP_DEFAULT_FLAGS and per-call options on each load. Flags conflicting with the MCP server's interactive session (e.g. --interaction-json, --version) are rejected with a warning.
